.file-embed.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(18, 18, 18) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(18, 18, 18), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(18, 18, 18) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(18, 18, 18) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(18, 18, 18), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(18, 18, 18) 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(112, 122, 250, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(2, 122, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(18, 18, 18, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(18, 18, 18, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(18, 18, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(18, 18, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
